title: Thai Stir-Fry with Yogurt Sauce
description: A delicious and healthy Thai-inspired stir-fry dish served with a side of creamy yogurt sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and carrots and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the basil, soy sauce, and ginger. Cook for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt and 1 tbsp of water.
Serve the stir-fry with the yogurt sauce on the side.
